sections.paragraph:
adjective

sharp, shrewd, witty, keen, sly, poignant, clever, bright, biting, epigrammatic, epigrammatical, incisive, ingenious, nimble, penetrating, penetrative, salt, salty, subtle, trenchant, acid

masculine noun שנון (>>שינון)

learning by heart, memorizing, memorization, indoctrination, rote; sharpening
